classes.reasoning: The document explicitly identifies itself as 'Protocol Synopsis for Laypersons' in the title, header, and footer. It provides a high-level summary of the trial protocol IOV-MEL-202, covering reason, objectives, endpoints, trial design, population, and interventions in a layperson-friendly format rather than the full detailed protocol.

trial_title: Phase 2, multicenter, open-label study of lifileucel (tumor-infiltrating lymphocytes [TIL]) in participants with previously treated advanced melanoma
intervention: Lifileucel (tumor-infiltrating lymphocytes [TIL]), cyclophosphamide, mesna, fludarabine, aldesleukin
summary: This is a layperson protocol synopsis for trial IOV-MEL-202, a Phase 2, multicenter, open-label, single-arm study evaluating the effectiveness and safety of lifileucel (tumor-infiltrating lymphocytes) treatment regimen in adults with previously treated advanced melanoma. The document outlines the trial rationale, objectives, endpoints (including objective response rate as primary endpoint), trial design, participant eligibility, treatment interventions (preparative chemotherapy, lifileucel infusion, and aldesleukin), and safety monitoring plans.
references_to: Protocol Synopsis for Laypersons V1.1 FINAL, 5DEC2025
